base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of maze_full_layout_with_dots_baked — a tile (level_layout) from 1980 pac man. Complete Pac-Man maze rendered with dots baked in — used as reference composite. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Complete Pac-Man maze rendered with dots baked in — used as reference composite; 28×31 grid, black-and-checker background showing ground texture beneath dots. Pink/cherry blossom floor visible in void spaces
